basic_details.job_title: Tezpur University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tezpur University has released the official Assistant Professor (Contractual) Notification 2026 on 09 July 2026 at https://www.tezu.ernet.in/. A total of 02 vacancies have been announced under the Tezpur University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates meeting the prescribed eligibility criteria with a qualification of Bachelor's Degree in any discipline, Master's Degree in Business Administration/PGDM with First Class or equivalent, and two years of professional experience can apply through email from 09 July 2026 to 23 July 2026. The official notification PDF and applicat

qualification.details: Essential Qualifications: | Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline, and Master’s Degree in Business Administration / PGDM with First Class or equivalent, and Two years of professional experience after acquiring the Master’s degree. | Desirable: | Candidates with Ph.D. shall be preferred. | Note: Academic score as per UGC Regulations 2018 (Appendix II, Table 3A) will be considered for shortlisting. Final selection is based on performance in the personal interview.

vacancy_details.Specialization: Marketing and Finance with strong background of Mathematics and Statistics

discipline_wise_breakdown.specialization: Marketing and Finance with strong background of Mathematics and Statistics

salary_details.details: Fixed monthly emolument: ₹80,000/- (No other allowances admissible). Purely contractual for 11 months with provision for extension based on satisfactory performance. No claim for regular appointment.

how_to_apply: Download the prescribed Application Form (Annexure-I & Annexure-II) from the University website.
Fill the forms completely and attach all required testimonials.
Send the application through email to [email protected] with the subject line: "APPLICATION FOR ASSISTANT PROFESSOR (Contractual) against Advt. No. 12/2026"
Eligible shortlisted candidates will be called for a personal interview (date to be notified).
important_instructions: Applications received after the last date will not be considered. Candidates must bring original documents at the time of interview. The University reserves the right to cancel the recruitment process at any stage. This is a contractual position. No regular absorption is guaranteed. For updates, regularly visit the official Tezpur University website.

rows.specialization: Marketing and Finance with strong background of Mathematics and Statistics

content_sections.heading: Tezpur University Assistant Professor Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Essential Qualifications: Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline, and Master’s Degree in Business Administration / PGDM with First Class or equivalent, and Two years of professional experience after acquiring the Master’s degree. Desirable: Candidates with Ph.D. shall be preferred. Note: Academic score as per UGC Regulations 2018 (Appendix II, Table 3A) will be considered for shortlisting. Final selection is based on performance in the personal interview.

content_sections.heading: Tezpur University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Emoluments & Other Terms
content_sections.text: Fixed monthly emolument: ₹80,000/- (No other allowances admissible). Purely contractual for 11 months with provision for extension based on satisfactory performance. No claim for regular appointment.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Tezpur University Assistant Professor 2026
content_sections.text: Download the prescribed Application Form (Annexure-I & Annexure-II) from the University website. Fill the forms completely and attach all required testimonials. Send the application through email to [email protected] with the subject line: "APPLICATION FOR ASSISTANT PROFESSOR (Contractual) against Advt. No. 12/2026" Last date: 23.07.2026 Eligible shortlisted candidates will be called for a personal interview (date to be notified).

content_sections.heading: Tezpur University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Applications received after the last date will not be considered. Candidates must bring original documents at the time of interview. The University reserves the right to cancel the recruitment process at any stage. This is a contractual position. No regular absorption is guaranteed. For updates, regularly visit the official Tezpur University website.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Tezpur University Assistant Professor Contractual 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application by email is 23 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there for Assistant Professor in Business Administration at Tezpur University?
faq.answer: There are 02 contractual posts available in the Department of Business Administration.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Assistant Professor (Contractual) at Tezpur University?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a fixed emolument of ₹80,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for Tezpur University MBA Assistant Professor 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have Bachelor’s degree + MBA/PGDM with First Class + 2 years professional experience. PhD is desirable.

faq.question: Q5. What is the specialization required for Tezpur University Assistant Professor Recruitment?
faq.answer: Marketing and Finance with a strong background in Mathematics and Statistics.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for Tezpur University Advt No. 12/2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent by email to [email protected] in the prescribed format (Annexure-I & II) by 23.07.2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is PhD mandatory for Tezpur University Contractual Faculty post?
faq.answer: No, PhD is desirable but not mandatory. Candidates with MBA + 2 years experience are eligible.

faq.question: Q8. What is the duration of the contractual appointment at Tezpur University?
faq.answer: The appointment is initially for 11 months, extendable based on satisfactory performance.

faq.question: Q9. Will there be any interview for Tezpur University Assistant Professor 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be called for a personal interview (date will be notified later).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form and official notification for Tezpur University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Visit the official website https://www.tezu.ernet.in/ for the detailed advertisement and Annexures.
